arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals Aston Villa transfer hope over two players and explains wish
arts.sum: Unai Emery can't guarantee Aston Villa will be able to keep both Ollie Watkins and Jhon Duran in their squad in the long-term, but admits it's a "privilege" to coach them. Every Aston Villa supporter should be proud of how we can have strikers like Ollie Watkins and Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa defender Diego Carlos responds directly to Unai Emery injury claim
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Diego Carlos has refuted Unai Emery's suggestion that he is injured ahead of Wednesday night's clash against Everton in the Premier League. This has understandably led to confusion about the centre-back's fitness and future at Villa Park after he has been linked with the exit door in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Newcastle fan favourite linked with a surprise move to Everton
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly targeting Newcastle United’s midfield stalwart Sean Longstaff in the January transfer window. Newcastle may be forced into selling players to comply with Profit and Sustainability Rules, putting several high-profile stars at risk of departure. As Newcastle navigates the financial constraints of sustainability regulations, key players like Miguel Almirón and Kieran Trippier have […] The post Newcastle fan favourite linked with a surprise move to Everton appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa announce the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund.

Fixtures Aston Villa U21 Vs. Bradford City - Tue, Jan 14th 2025, 19:30 Aston Villa Under-21s bowed out of the Vertu Trophy at the round of 16 stage, losing 3-1 to Bradford City at Villa Park. A valiant effort from Josep Gombau's Young Lions could do little to stop a full-strength Bradford side, who took a commanding 3-1 lead into the half-time break. 2-0 down inside 15 minutes after goals from Calum Kavanagh and Jack Shepherd, Villa responded, halving the deficit with a sublime effort from Kyrie Pierre, before Callum Johnson restored City's two-goal advantage before the break. Despite Villa's best efforts to salvage something from the game in the second half, the League Two side's defence stood firm to end the hosts' journey in the competition, with a quarter-final elimination representing the club's best-ever finish in the EFL Trophy. Bradford’s threat was clear in the opening stages, and it was the Bantams who started the stronger in B6, Alex Pattison dragging a pair of early efforts wide. But Graham Alexander’s side were ahead inside the opening 10 minutes, when skipper Richie Smallwood’s corner to the front post was glanced into the far corner via the head of Kavanagh. The visitors doubled their advantage just six minutes later. Bobby Pointon’s corner from the opposite side wasn’t cleared by the Villa defence, allowing Shepherd to lash home despite the best efforts of the hosts to hack it off the goalline. But Villa responded admirably, and within 10 minutes, had cut the deficit in two. George Hemmings found Brad Burrowes down the left-hand side, who played the ball to Pierre on the edge of the area. The winger did the rest, jinking away from Ciarán Kelly, shifting the ball onto his right foot and bending an unstoppable effort into the top corner. However, the hosts’ momentum was short lived, as moments later, Bradford had a third from another corner. Pointon again swung in, and Johnson flicked a deft header past Oli Zych. The Villa stopper was alert just after the half-hour to deny Kavanagh a second, parrying the forward’s stinging effort after he had cut inside onto his left foot. Villa began the second period again looking to reduce the arrears. Hemmings found the run of the lively Burrowes in behind Shepherd, but he could not keep his effort on target. Come the hour mark, Burrowes was threatening again, darting to the left side of the area and arrowing a great effort towards the far corner, which Sam Walker had to be at full stretch to keep out. Still, Villa continued to probe. More neat work on the right from Pierre saw him locate Hemmings in the centre, but his touch dropped a few yards wide of the post, as Bradford's defensive stubbornness continued to frustrate. Gombau's youngsters continued to push until the very last minute, Travis Patterson flashing an effort agonisingly wide of the far post, but the score remained 3-1, as the Villans' journey in the Vertu Trophy - as the only 'invited' academy side to advance to the knockout stages - came to an end. Aston Villa: Zych; Rowe, Katsukunya, Swinkels, Patterson; Alcock (c) (Barnes 83'), Borland; Pierre (Pavey 79'), Taylor (Young 60'), Hemmings (Cotcher 79'); Burrowes. Subs (not used): Emery (GK); Amundsen-Day, Fortes. Bradford City: S. Walker; Johnson (Baldwin 46'), Kelly, Shepherd; Halliday, Smallwood (c), Pattison (Sarcevic 46'), Richards (J. Walker 66'); Pointon (Wright 88'), Oduor, Kavanagh (Oliver 66'). Subs (not used): Doyle (GK); Byrne. Upcoming Fixtures Manchester United U21 Vs. arts.ttl: Sevilla open transfer talks with Aston Villa
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga outfit Sevilla have opened negotiations with their counterparts at Aston Villa, over a potential January sale. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, citing L’Équipe,…

arts.ttl: Team News: Everton vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Everton and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Malen completes move to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Donyell Malen has completed his move from Borussia Dortmund to Aston Villa. The 25-year-old has reportedly signed a contract until mid-2029 with Borussia Dortmund receiving around €23 million plus add ons. The winger, who can also play through the middle, has previously played in England as he spent two years in the youth teams of […] The post Malen completes move to Aston Villa appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen transfer news: What can he bring to Premier League? Aston Villa signing has been hot & cold for Dortmund
arts.sum: Over the last 13 months, there have been rumors that Donyell Malen could leave Borussia Dortmund. Now it is finally official. On Tuesday, Premier League club Aston Villa have reached...
